overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a yellow shirt and leopard-print pants walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character moves through covered walkways and open plazas before sitting on a bench to use a handheld device.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered corridor illuminated by purple neon lights. The corridor features shop fronts and digital billboards on the right side, with concrete walls and windows on the left. NPCs sit on benches along the walkway.

segments.scene_description: The character exits the corridor into an open plaza featuring concrete benches and a large digital screen on a nearby building. The character approaches a bench, sits down, and begins interacting with a handheld device while other NPCs walk through the plaza and one sits nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city, transitioning from sheltered concrete walkways into vibrant, neon-lit open plazas. It begins within a covered passage overlooking a glowing skyline as the character holsters a weapon and walks forward. As the character exits the shelter, the environment opens into a wide plaza bathed in green neon light, filled with food stalls and pedestrians. The scene then shifts into a purple-lit corridor lined with digital billboards and shop fronts before finally emerging into a final open plaza. Here, the camera follows the character as they approach a concrete bench beneath a massive digital screen to interact with a handheld device.
